verses.text: Those who trust the LORD are 'as mount Zion, which cannot be removed,' and 'as the mountains are round about Jerusalem, so the LORD is round about his people.' He encircles them. The trusting are as immovable as the hills, hedged about by God Himself.

Those who trust the LORD are 'as mount Zion, which cannot be removed,' and 'as the mountains are round about Jerusalem, so the LORD is round about his people.' He encircles them. The trusting are as immovable as the hills, hedged about by God Himself.

The rod of the wicked shall not rest on the righteous; the LORD does good to the upright but leads away the crooked. Evil shall not finally rule the godly. He keeps His people and grants peace to Israel.
